theme_and_archetype.reasoning: A B2B shared workspace tracker requires authority, functional clarity, and objective precision. A Swiss Brutalist approach with Stark White, Deep Charcoal, and two high-contrast primary colors ensures quick legibility on mobile devices.

typography_rules.label: text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-[#5E5E5E]
typography_rules.general: Never use pure black or grey without intent. Ensure monetary values use 'tabular-nums' for alignment.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Control Room Grid. Mobile-first, dense but highly structured. Everything is optical and geometric.
layout_and_spacing.container: w-full max-w-md mx-auto px-4 py-6 flex flex-col gap-6

acting_as_toggle.description: Segmented control to switch active user.
acting_as_toggle.style: Flex container with 1px border. Active state changes background to the respective user's primary color (Red for Andrews, Blue for Bone) and text to white. Inactive is white background with grey text.

quick_log_form.inputs: Flat inputs, 1px border-[#E5E5E5], rounded-none, h-12 px-4. Focus state: border-[#111111] ring-1 ring-[#111111] outline-none.
quick_log_form.button: h-12 w-full bg-[#111111] text-white font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-sm active:scale-[0.98] transition-transform

live_jobs_ledger.description: List of logged jobs for the month.
live_jobs_ledger.item_style: flex flex-col py-4 border-b border-[#E5E5E5] last:border-b-0
live_jobs_ledger.layout: Row 1: Service Name (left, bold) and Final Cost (right, mono). Row 2: Date (left, text-xs), User Badge (left, small pill), Discount (right, text-xs text-[#10B981]).
live_jobs_ledger.user_badge: px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded-sm

monthly_tally_card.description: Financial summary card showing who owes who.
monthly_tally_card.style: bg-[#111111] text-white p-6 rounded-none flex flex-col gap-4 border-l-4
monthly_tally_card.dynamic_border: If Andrews owes, border-l color is #E52B12. If Bone owes, border-l color is #002FA7.
monthly_tally_card.layout: Top: 'Net Balance' label. Middle: Large Mono font showing the owing amount. Bottom: Subtext stating exactly who owes who.

accessibility.contrast: All text must pass WCAG AA. White text on Red/Blue brand colors must be tested. Dark grey on off-white used for secondary text.
accessibility.focus: Visible focus rings on all form inputs and interactive elements.
accessibility.test_ids: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='log-job-submit-button').

avatars.description: Abstract red geometric avatar for Hayden Andrews
Abstract blue geometric avatar for Hayden Bone

media.instructions_to_main_agent: Use these avatars in the 'Acting As' toggle or in the ledger rows to reinforce visual identification without relying solely on text. Do not use placeholder images.
